rationale: Section 2001.0225 applies only to major environmental rules adopted by state agencies. The proposed change is a statutory amendment to a tax exemption amount, not an environmental rule, and does not trigger this section.
quote: This section applies only to a major environmental rule adopted by a state agency
_note: No conflict; the proposed change is a legislative amendment to Tax Code §11.13(b), not an agency rulemaking subject to Gov't Code §2001.0225.
